2606.09883.title: TD-Grokking: Learning from Zero-Reward Problems by Training-Time Decomposition
2606.09883.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have made remarkable progress in reasoning tasks, largely driven by post-training paradigms, especially reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). However, a critical bottleneck persists: RLVR fails on highly challenging zero-reward problems, where all sampled reasoning trajectories yield uniformly failed outcomes, providing no optimization signal to drive model improvement. Prior efforts to address this limitation, such as dense process supervision, partial reward assignment, or prefix-guided exploration, suffer from inherent task constraints or do not fully equip the policy model with the capabilities necessary to solve the original intractable problems. To address this, we propose TD-Grokking, a training-time decomposition framework for zero-reward problems. It recursively decomposes intractable root problems into self-contained, verifiable subproblems, forming hierarchical trees where solvable leaves provide non-zero rewards. Evaluations on mathematical and medical tasks show that TD-Grokking outperforms vanilla GRPO as well as all baseline approaches. Together with detailed analysis, these results confirm that training-time decomposition effectively converts zero-reward examples into usable training signals, enabling consistent performance gains. Our code and datasets are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TD-Grokking-6567/.
2606.09883.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在推理任務上取得了顯著進展，這主要得益於後訓練範式，特別是具有可驗證獎勵的強化學習（RLVR）。然而，一個關鍵瓶頸依然存在：RLVR在高度挑戰性的零獎勵問題上失效，所有抽樣的推理軌跡都產生一致失敗的結果，無法提供優化信號以推動模型改進。之前為了解決這一限制所做的努力，例如密集過程監督、部分獎勵分配或前綴引導探索，均受到內在任務約束的影響，或者未能充分賦予策略模型解決原始難題所需的能力。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了TD-Grokking，這是一個針對零獎勵問題的訓練時分解框架。它將難以處理的根問題遞歸地分解為自包含的、可驗證的子問題，形成層次樹，其中可解的葉子提供非零獎勵。對數學和醫學任務的評估顯示，TD-Grokking的表現超過了普通的GRPO以及所有基準方法。結合詳細的分析，這些結果確認訓練時分解有效地將零獎勵示例轉化為可用的訓練信號，從而實現穩定的性能提升。我們的代碼和數據集可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TD-Grokking-6567/ 獲得。
2606.09883.author: Ningyuan Xi et.al.
2606.09883.authors: Ningyuan Xi, Hao Xu, Hongsheng Xin, Ning Miao
